{
  "lean_declaration": "theorem tprod'_eq_of_coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod' {f : ℕ → PowerSeries K} {lim : PowerSeries K}\n    (h : CoeffStabilizesTo (fun i => ∏ j ∈ Finset.range (i + 1), f j) lim)\n    (hconst : ∀ i, constantCoeff (f i) = 1) :\n    tprod' f (isMultipliable_of_coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod' h hconst) = lim :=\n  tprod'_eq_of_coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod h hconst",
  "declaration_name": "tprod'_eq_of_coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod'",
  "used_context": [
    "CoeffStabilizesTo",
    "IsMultipliable",
    "tprod'",
    "constantCoeff",
    "Finset.range",
    "isMultipliable_of_coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod'",
    "tprod'_eq_of_coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "This lemma is a thin wrapper around the imported theorem tprod'_eq_of_coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod. It uses the local wrapper isMultipliable_of_coeffStabilizesTo_partial_prod' to obtain the multipliability hypothesis."
  ]
}
